summary: Completed comprehensive testing of College Quiz Platform with real MongoDB backend. All backend APIs (30/30) passed. Frontend testing confirmed multi-role authentication, quiz functionality, semester results with real marksheet data, and dashboard features work correctly.

integration_issues.flow: Page navigation between student dashboard sections
integration_issues.issue: Some navigation buttons may not properly redirect to expected pages in all scenarios

passed_tests: Health check endpoint returns 200
Invalid login returns 401 with proper error message
Student login (22WJ8A6745/student123) returns 200 with access token
Teacher login (T001/teacher123) returns 200 with access token
Admin login (A001/admin123) returns 200 with access token
Auth /me endpoint works for all user types
Student dashboard API returns CGPA 8.59 and quiz data
Teacher dashboard API returns quiz management stats
Admin dashboard API returns system statistics
Quiz listing API works for all user roles
Quiz attempt flow: start -> answer -> submit -> get results
Semester results API returns 3 semesters of real marksheet data
Student analytics API returns performance metrics
Leaderboard API returns student rankings
Logout API works for all user types
Frontend login page renders with demo credentials
Invalid frontend login shows error message
Student dashboard shows CGPA 8.6 and active quizzes
Quiz attempt page loads with timer and question navigation
MCQ questions can be answered and submitted
Quiz submission redirects to results page
Semester results page shows real grades (O, A+, A, B+, B)
CGPA progression shows 9.10 -> 9.33 -> 8.59 as expected
Teacher dashboard shows quiz management interface
Admin dashboard shows system management interface
Logout returns to login page correctly
